data.en: Last week I went to the theatre.
data.hint: went to 动词短语，表示“去”。
accept: Yesterday I went to the theatre.

data.en: I had a very good seat.
data.hint: had 动词过去式，此处表示“拥有”。

data.en: The play was very interesting.
data.hint: play 在这里作名词，表示“戏剧”。

data.en: I did not enjoy it.
data.hint: did not 过去时否定形式。

data.en: A young man and a young woman were sitting behind me.
data.cn: 一青年男子与一青年女子坐在我的身后。
data.hint: were sitting 过去进行时，表示动作正在发生。
accept: A young woman and a young man were sitting behind me.

data.en: They were talking loudly.
data.hint: loudly 副词修饰动词 were talking。

data.en: I got very angry.
data.hint: got angry 系表结构，表示变得生气。

data.en: I could not hear the actors.
data.cn: 我听不见演员在说什么。
data.hint: could not 情态动词否定，表示过去无法做某事。

data.en: I turned round.
data.hint: turned round 转身。

data.en: I looked at the man and the woman angrily.
data.cn: 我生气地看着那一男一女。
data.hint: angrily 副词修饰 looked at。
accept: I looked at the woman and the man angrily.
I looked angrily at the man and the woman.
I looked angrily at the woman and the man.

data.en: They did not pay any attention.
data.hint: pay attention to 关注，注意。

data.en: In the end, I could not bear it.
data.hint: in the end 表示“最后，终于”。
accept: I could not bear it in the end.

data.en: I turned round again.
data.hint: turned round again 再次转身。

data.en: I can't hear a word!
data.hint: can't hear 听不见，can't 是情态动词否定。

data.en: It's none of your business.
data.hint: none of your business 常用口语，意为不关你的事。

data.en: This is a private conversation!
data.hint: private 作形容词修饰 conversation。

data.en: Why did the writer complain to the people behind him?
data.cn: 作者为什么向坐在他后面的人抱怨？
data.hint: complain to sb. 向某人抱怨。

data.en: He was sitting in front of them.
data.hint: in front of 在...前面，常用于方位表述。

data.en: The young man and the young woman paid no attention to the writer.
data.cn: 那一男一女对作者毫不理会。
data.hint: paid no attention to 对...毫不理会。
accept: The young woman and the young man paid no attention to the writer.

data.en: He thought the writer was trying to listen to his conversation.
data.cn: 他以为作者在试图听他的谈话。
data.hint: thought 引导宾语从句，try to do sth. 努力做某事。

data.en: I enjoyed the film yesterday.
data.cn: 我昨天看这部电影看得很开心。
data.hint: 主+谓+宾+时间状语。

data.en: I listened to the news carefully.
data.hint: 主+谓+宾+方式状语。

data.en: The man played the piano well.
data.hint: 主+谓+宾+方式状语（well）。

data.en: The children played games quietly in their room yesterday.
data.cn: 孩子们昨天在房间里安静地玩游戏。
data.hint: 主+谓+宾+方式+地点+时间。
accept: Yesterday the children played games quietly in their room.

data.en: He opened the door quietly.
data.hint: 主+谓+宾+方式状语。

data.en: He left immediately.
data.hint: immediately 表示立刻，作方式/时间状语。

data.en: He planted a tree in the corner of the garden.
data.cn: 他在花园角落种了一棵树。
data.hint: 主+谓+宾+地点状语。

data.en: He read the letter quickly in his office before lunch.
data.cn: 午饭前他在办公室快速读了信。
data.hint: 方式 + 地点 + 时间 的排列顺序。
accept: Before lunch he read the letter quickly in his office.

data.en: I borrowed a book from the library this morning.
data.cn: 我今天早上从图书馆借了一本书。
data.hint: borrow sth. from 从某处借某物。
accept: This morning I borrowed a book from the library.

data.en: The cook spoilt the soup.
data.hint: 主+谓+宾结构，spoilt 是 spoil 的过去式。

data.en: We stay at home on Sundays.
data.hint: stay at home 待在家里，on Sundays 在周日。
accept: On Sundays we stay at home.

data.en: There are a lot of people at the bus stop.
data.hint: There be 句型表示“有”。

data.en: The little boy ate an apple greedily in the kitchen this morning.
data.cn: 那个小男孩今天早上在厨房里狼吞虎咽地吃了一个苹果。
data.hint: 主+谓+宾+方式+地点+时间。
accept: This morning the little boy ate an apple greedily in the kitchen.

data.en: She draws beautifully.
data.hint: draws 第三人称单数，beautifully 副词。

data.en: I like music very much.
data.hint: like... very much 极其喜欢某物。

data.en: They built a new school in our village last year.
data.cn: 他们去年在我们村建了一所新学校。
data.hint: built 是 build 的过去式，last year 过去时间。
accept: Last year they built a new school in our village.

data.en: The match ended at four o'clock.
data.hint: ended 动词过去式，at + 具体时间。

data.en: She received a letter from her brother last week.
data.cn: 她上周收到了她兄弟的一封信。
data.hint: receive... from... 收到来自...的信。
accept: Last week she received a letter from her brother.

data.en: The policeman arrested the thief.
data.hint: 主 + 谓 + 宾 经典句型。

data.en: The thief arrested the policeman.
data.cn: 小偷逮捕了警察。（语法正确但含义颠倒）
data.hint: 主语和宾语互换，含义完全改变。

data.en: I went to America last year.
data.hint: 主+谓+地点+时间。
accept: Last year I went to America.

data.en: He is a young man.
data.hint: 主+系+表结构。

data.en: The young man said rudely.
data.cn: 那个年轻男子粗鲁地说道。
data.hint: 主+谓+方式状语。

data.en: They were talking very loudly in the theatre.
data.cn: 他们在剧院里非常大声地交谈。
data.hint: 主+谓+方式+地点。

data.en: I could not hear the play.
data.hint: 主+情态动词否定+谓+宾。

data.en: She received a letter yesterday.
data.hint: 主+谓+宾+时间状语。

data.en: They did not pay any attention to him.
data.hint: pay attention to sb. 理会某人。

data.en: I turned round to look at them.
data.hint: turn round to do sth. 转身去做某事。

data.en: The film was very interesting yesterday.
data.hint: 主+系+表+时间状语。

data.en: He opened the window quickly this morning.
data.cn: 今天早上他快速地打开了窗户。
data.hint: 主+谓+宾+方式+时间。
accept: This morning he opened the window quickly.
